name: typography-large
visual_summary: A large typography component for displaying headings and titles in a visually appealing way. Use it when you need to draw attention to a piece of content on your page. It's perfect for headings, banners, and other titles.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready heading component with the following characteristics:

Name: typography-large
Description: A large typography component for displaying headings and titles in a visually appealing way. Use it when you need to draw attention to a piece of content on your page. It's perfect for headings, banners, and other titles.
Style: light, modern
Interactions: static
Tags: heading, title, banner, font-size-large, typography

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
